articles.title: Gemini Offers Staking in Lead-Up to ETH Merge
articles.description: Gemini has announced support for staking, allowing users of its exchange to earn rewards on eligible crypto assets. Gemini will support staking beginning today, August 18.In an announcement, Gemini said that users will initially be able to stake and earn rewards on Polygon's MATIC token. It also said that Ethereum (ETH), Solana (SOL), Polkadot (DOT), and Audius (AUDIO) staking will be...

articles.title: Ethereum Price Slides As Staked Token Reaches New ATH Ahead Of Hyped Merge
articles.description: Despite changes in the asset’s price, Ethereum is steadily adding to the ETH 2.0 staking contract. According to the development team, this occurs about a month before the Merge is scheduled to occur. Ethereum Staked Token Hit New ATH According to Dune Analytics data, more over 13.2 million ETH have been deposited to the staking contract, however there are only about 80,000 unique depositors....

articles.title: Vitalik Buterin’s Take On Possible Ethereum Censorship By OFAC
articles.description: Vitalik Buterin, the co-founder of Ethereum, frowns deeply on the possibility of Ethereum censorship by the US Treasury Department’s Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC). He maintained that such an action amounts to an attack on the network. Hence, it could bring results in different dimensions. Buterin disclosed his stance concerning this in a tweet. […]

articles.title: Chinese mining giant Canaan doubles profits despite the blanket crypto ban
articles.description: The Chinese crypto miner maker Canaan has been expanding its mining business, accumulating a total of 346.84 BTC by the end of June.

articles.title: How to Trade on sudoswap, the NFT Market’s Answer to Uniswap
articles.description: Learn how to buy and sell NFTs on cryptos first NFT automated market maker. sudoswap is making NFT trading even easier.Launched in May 2022, sudoswap is cryptos first NFT automated market maker. The Ethereum-based platform functions similarly to Uniswap, letting users trustlessly trade assets through user-funded liquidity pools. However, instead of trading between two fungible tokens, sudoswap...
